text:
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: There are up to three long-term care providers for each month; the sequence (first–third LTSS 
provider ID) is indicated by the last digit. 

Two additional fields apply to the first through third providers. The monthly LTSS_LVL_CD_1_MM 
corresponds to the LTSS provider ID (LTSS_PRVDR_ID_1). The latest level of care code for the provider 
is LTSS_LVL_CD_1_LTST.
